license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.tneembe
title: Example of two-path protocol
author: Cleyde V Helena

steps_raw.instruction: Add 10 µL of Solution A into a beacker
Prepare 100 mL of 0.9% NaCl Add 20 mL of PBS 0.1 Molarity (M), (adjust pH to 7)
Let it cool down and store in a -80 °C freezer
proceed with the experiment by injecting the solution on an Agilent 7890B GC system
